fields.query: the user-facing question; CN or EN, mirror real chat usage
fields.expected_thread_ids: list of bimmerpost thread_id ints — sources are correct if any of these appear in topK
fields.vehicle_context: optional chassis hint passed alongside the query (e.g. 'F80')
fields.notes: optional free-form description of why these threads are the canonical answer

_format.instructions: Author 20 more entries to reach the 30-question target. Pick threads from the populated bimmerpost sqlite (data/ingest.db) so the eval set tracks real retrievable content. Aim for: 60% diagnostic, 25% procedural, 10% part-spec, 5% tuning. Mix 50% EN / 30% CN / 20% mixed. Cover all 7 chassis.

questions.query: N54 HPFP cold start hesitation, no CEL, persists ~2s
questions.notes: Classic high-pressure fuel pump signature. Replace with placeholder thread IDs once you've identified the canonical threads in the corpus.
